title: Responsive attributes
description: Responsive attributes adjust values based on viewport breakpoints or host platform. Breakpoints are configured in `jsonui-doc-web/tailwind.config.js`.

data.name: responsive
data.description: Size class overrides. Keys: compact, medium, regular, landscape, or hyphenated combos (e.g. regular-landscape). Values: object of attribute overrides for that size class.
data.summary: Object whose keys are breakpoint names (`xs` / `sm` / `md` / `lg` / `xl`) and values are attribute overrides applied at that breakpoint and above. Merges into the base attributes.

platformDiff.react: CSS media queries + Tailwind breakpoints に変換される（jsonui-doc-web のみ対応）。
platformDiff.swift_uikit: size class に応じた layout constraint 切替にマップ（実装依存）。
platformDiff.kotlin_xml: `res/layout-<qualifier>/` のリソースで別 Layout を用意する方式に近い。

breakpoints._description: Default breakpoints used by jsonui-doc-web. Override in `tailwind.config.js`.
